'The Great Barrier Reef, located off the coast of Queensland, Australia, is the world's largest coral reef system, stretching over 2,300 kilometers. It is composed of over 2,900 individual reef systems and 900 islands. answer: The Great Barrier Reef is the world's largest coral reef system spanning over 2,300 km off Australia's coast and supporting vast marine biodiversity.
